title: FCS & CA Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova’n Teikhangah kudam a hawng
content:
348/2026-2027

Saitual, the 30th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan FCS & CA Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan Govt. Godown (kudam) chu Teikhang SC-ah a hawng a, a hawnna inkhawm hi Teikhang Community Hall-ah neih niin, Minister hi Pi Saizikpuii, Director, FCS &CA department-in a tawiawm.

He hunah hian khuallian Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan thu a sawi a, FCS & CA lama an hotute thawhrimna zara Teikhanga kudam hawn a ni thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, a khua leh a chhehvela mipuiten an chhawr ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Khuallian chuan gas leh buhfai buk dik chu sawrkar thupui a ni tih a sawi a, mipuite pawhin hruaitu dik an duh chuan dik taka thil tih chu an mawhphurhna a ni, a ti. Revenue Department lamah pawh a thawhpuite nen theih tawp an chhuah zel thu sawiin, Saituala Revenue Headquarters te pawh an thuam chak chho mek zel a ni, a ti.

Minister chuan mipuite nena harsatna leh mamawh inhrilh tawnna hun remchang tak an hmang thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, khawtlang hruaitute ngenna hrang hrang te pawh bawhzui a, theih tawp chhuahpui a tum thu a sawi bawk. Khuallian chuan hmasawnna rualkhai tak nei tur chuan khawpui leh thingtlangah hmasawnna a kal kawp a ngai tih a sawi a, huaisen taka mahni dikna chanvo hria a, hma lam pen ngam turin kalkhawmte chu a fuih bawk a ni.

Vawiin inkhawm hi Pu Zairemkima, DCSO, Saitual chuan a kai hruai a, FCS & CA Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova leh Pu Biakkima, VCP, Teikhang ten thu an sawi a, Pu Lalruatsanga, JE, PWD Project Division-III hnen atangin technical report ngaihthlak a ni bawk. Pi Saizikpuii, Director, FCS &CA department chuan lawmthu sawinain hun a khar a ni.

title: Lungleiah Art & Culture hnuaia hnam lam leh zai Condensed Course zir chhuakte certificate hlanna hun buatsaih a ni
content:
348/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 30:Vawiin khan Lunglei Venglaia Art & Culture Auditorium-ah Lunglei District Art & Culture Office buatsaih ni 45 chhung awh Mizo hnam lam leh zai zirna, 14th Condensed Course on Traditional Dance & Songs 2025–2026 hmawr bawkna leh a zir chhuakte hnena certificate hlanna hun hman a ni a. A&C Tribal Research Institute-a Senior Research Officer Pu RK Lalawmpuia chu Khuallian a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) an ṭhu khawm
content:
347/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026Ṭau thla ni 30:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) chu Additional Deputy Commissioner Pi Rochuangkimi Khenglawt kaihhruaiin Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah an ṭhu khawm.

PHED Lunglei Sub-Divisional Officer (North) Er NT Jevis chuan thu ngaihtuah tur sawi zauvin, PHED Lungleia Swachh Bharat Mission–Gramin (SBM–G) District Coordinator Pi F. Lalrindiki chuan SBM–G hnuaia Lunglei District-a hma lakna hrang hrang report a pe a. SBM–G 2.0 hnuaia ODF Plus Model Village kalpui tura khaw hrang hrang dinhmun endik dan tur te, faina leh thianghlimna kawnga hmasawnna tur leh bawlhhlawh sawngbawl leh thehthang kawnga hma lakna tur hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni.

Vawiina Lunglei DWSM ṭhut khawma tar lan a nih danin, Lunglei District chhunga SBM–G hma lakna hnuaia khaw awm zawng zawng khaw 99 chu kum 2019 khan Open Defecation Free (ODF) Village-ah puan vek niin, kum 2023 khan ODF Plus-ah puan an ni vek tawh bawk a. SBM–G Phase–I leh Phase–II hnuaiah Lunglei District chhungah chhungkaw bil inthiarna (Individual Household Latrine) 26,680 sak zawh tawh niin, vantlang bawlhhlawh paihna (Community Solid Waste Management) 606 leh tui chhe paihna (Community Grey Water Management) 507 sak zawh tawh a ni a. Vantlang inthiarna (Community Sanitary Complex) 33 sak zawh a ni tawh bawk.

Attachment

title: “Let us collectively distance ourselves from anything that can incite violence and conflict” – Chief Minister
content:
45/2026-2027

Sesawng, 30 April 2026:Cadres of the Hmar Peoples’ Convention (Democratic) – Lalhmingthanga Sanate Faction have formally returned to the mainstream, laying down their arms and embracing a peaceful way of life. To mark this significant milestone, the Government organised the Home Coming & Arms Laying Ceremony today at the Central Training Institute Parade Ground, Sesawng, in the presence of Chief Minister Mr. Lalduhoma.

The programme was attended by Speaker Mr. Lalbiakzama, Home Minister Mr. K. Sapdanga, Ministers, Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha), Deputy Speaker, Adviser to the Chief Minister, and several MLAs.

It may be recalled that on 14 April 2026, the Government of Mizoram and the HPC (D) Lalhmingthanga Sanate Faction signed a peace agreement at Sakawrdaia. Today’s ceremony formally marked the laying down of arms in accordance with that agreement.

In his address, the Chief Minister observed that discussions on peace in Mizoram have long been intertwined with the issue of HPC (D). He reiterated that the Government has consistently remained open to dialogue and commended the Home Minister and his team for their tireless efforts in achieving this breakthrough. He affirmed that Mizoram can now confidently be described as a truly peaceful state.

Emphasising unity, he stated that there are no divisions within the Mizo community, and that all share a common identity as Mizo. Any attempt to create divisions, he asserted, will not succeed. He called upon all sections of society to stand united and move forward together.

Reflecting on the value of peace, the Chief Minister noted that peace is hard-earned and demands sacrifice. He expressed deep appreciation for the courage shown by those who have laid down arms, describing their decision as an act of true bravery. He urged citizens to reject any ideology, policy, or action that could give rise to unrest or conflict, and to work collectively towards sustaining peace and stability in the state.

Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga described the occasion as a historic day for Mizoram and warmly welcomed the HPC (D) (LF) cadres into the mainstream. He attributed the success of the agreement to the Chief Minister’s unwavering commitment to peace, highlighting his personal sacrifices in pursuit of a harmonious Mizoram. He described the Chief Minister as a true symbol of peace for Mizoram and encouraged the cadres to work together with the Government for the progress of the state and to lead peaceful lives with their families.

Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama expressed his satisfaction at the successful conclusion of the agreement, noting that as the only ruling party MLA from the Hmar Demand Area, achieving peace has always been among his foremost priorities.

Pu Lalhmingthanga Sanate, leader of the faction, acknowledged the positive changes brought about under the present Government. He appreciated the Chief Minister’s understanding of their concerns and cited key developmental initiatives, including the construction of the Unity Bridge and improvements to the Mauchar road. While noting that the agreement may not fully meet all expectations, he stated that it is acceptable and satisfactory, which led to their decision to join the peace process.

The ceremony began with a Bible reading and prayer led by Pastor Lalhmunsiama, ICI, Sesawng. Mr. Vanlalmawia, Secretary, Home, delivered the welcome address. The cadres formally handed over their arms to IGP (Headquarters) Mr. H. Ramthlengliana, followed by an oath-taking ceremony led by Mr. Stephen Lalrinawma, Sr. SP (CID), in which they pledged to renounce violence. The programme concluded with a vote of thanks by Mr. Lalmuanpuia Punte, MLA and Adviser to the Chief Minister.

For context, following the Peace Accord of 1986, sections of the Hmar community felt that their aspirations remained unfulfilled, leading to the formation of the HPC. In 1994, an agreement with the Government resulted in the establishment of the Sinlung Hills Development Council. Subsequently, a faction formed the HPC (D) under the leadership of Lalhmingthanga Sanate. Another faction, led by Pu H. Lalsangbera, had already entered into a peace agreement with the Government in April 2018. Talks with the Lalhmingthanga Sanate Faction resumed in 2024 and, after four rounds of negotiations, culminated in the agreement signed earlier this month.

With this development, Mizoram no longer has any active underground ethnic insurgent groups.

title: KOLASIB DC HOVIN DISTRICT NCORD COMMITTEE AN THUKHAWM
content:
346/2026-2027

Kolasib, 30th April, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Kolasib-ah Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia hovin District Level NCORD thutkhawm neih a ni a. He hunah hian Kolasib District chhunga ruihhlo darh zau zel tur ven dan leh ruihhlo do kawnga hmalak dan tur hrang hrangte sawiho a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Member Secretary, Kolasib Superintendent of Police (SP) Pu Lalrinpuia Varte chuan inlawmna thu sawiin, Kolasib Police ten district chhunga ruihhlo tawlh luh leh tawlh chhuah danchah nan theihtawp an chhuah mek thu a sawi a. Ruihhlo ngaite enkawl (rehabilitation) lamah district-in hma a sawn zel thu leh, Jordan Centre pawh Mizoram Synod-in an enkawl chhunzawm dawn avangin hetiang kawngah hian a chhawk zangkhai a beisei a ni, a ti. Ruihhlo hluarna hmun (hotspot mapping) chu Police ten an lo nei tawh a, amaherawhchu a kimchang zawk neih a nih theih nan a zau zawka thawhkhawm a pawimawh thu a sawi. Ruihhlo tawlhtute an fin tawh em avangin man chhuah an harsat thu leh, ruihhlo addict te chu dan hmanga hrem ngawt theih an nih loh avangin rehabilitation centre-a dah luh an ngaih thin thu sawiin, hemi kawngah hian mitin tanrual a tul takzet a ni, a ti bawk.

Thutkhawm kaihruaitu leh District NCORD Chairman nibawk Kolasib DC Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan ruihhlo dona kawngah mitin huapa inzirtirna (awareness) neih uar a tul thu a sawi a. Ruihhlo la khawih ngai loten an fihlim pui zel theih nan a bika rawtna siamin, Sunday School leh sikul hrang hrangah naupangte hnena zirtirna tha tak pe thei tur mithiam (specialist) Aizawl emaw hmun dang atanga chah luh chu a pawimawh thu a sawi . Ruihhlo do tur hian Village Council, NGO, Rehabilitation Centre leh mipuite tangtlanga kan thawhho a ngai a ni, a ti a. Police te, tlawmngai pawl hrang hrang, VC leh Rehab Centre ten mahni theihna zawn theuha ruihhlo umbo nana theihtawp an chhuah thin chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin a fak bawk a ni.

He hunah hian SDPO Pu R. Lalnunpuia chuan Powerpoint Presentation pe in, kum 2016-a sawrkar laipuiin NCORD a din chhan chu ruihhlo hman tlem (Demand reduction) leh a tawlh luh tihtawp (Supply reduction) kaltlanga India ram chu 'Drugs Free' a siam tumna a nih thu a tarlang a. Thla tir ni 16 atang khan Rengtekawn-ah YMA te nen tangkawpin highway duty neih tan a nih thu a sawi. SDPO hian kumin 2026 chhunga Kolasib District Executive Force (DEF) ten ruihhlo leh zu an man dan tlangpui a tarlang a:

KUM 2026 CHHUNGA KOLASIB POLICE TE RUIHHLO LEH ZU MAN ZAT:

Heroin (No. 4):Gram 1364.82 man a ni a, a hlutna hi  Rs. 26,22,70,950/- hu a ni a. He thilah hian mi 12 manin, thubuai (cases) 7 ziah luh a ni.

Zu (Liquor):IMFL litre 2214, Beer litre 1227 leh LML litre 37 man a ni a. A hlutna chu Rs. 13,73,980/- hu niin, mi 10 man an ni a, thubuai 7 ziah luh a ni bawk.

NCORD thutkhawm hian hmalak chhunzawm dan tur relin, khaw tinah 'Village Level Task Force' din nise an ti a. Kolasib khaw chhungah chuan SP leh District official ten ruahmanna an siampui ang a, thingtlang khuaah te chuan BDO leh Police te leh khawtlang hruaituten hma la se an ti. Ruihhlo that loh zia inhrilhriatna (Awareness) uar taka kalpui nise tiin, District Education Officer (DEO) hmalaknain sikul hrang hrangah Education Awareness pek nise tiin an rel a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT HEADQUARTERS LAND COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
345/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 30th April 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Headquarters Land Committee chu Serchhip Village Council area paruk (6) chhunga ram pass dilnate ngaihtuahin an thukhawm. He thutkhawm hi District Land Committee Chairman  Pu Paul L. Khuma’n a kaihruai a, Member Secretary Pu Gaston Vanlalhriatpuia leh member dangte an kim tha hle.

Vawiina ram pass dilna Committee-in a ngaihtuahte hi a vaiin 12 niin an zinga 9 te chu House Site dilna a ni a; a dang 3 te chu Periodic Patta dilna te an ni. Land Committee chuan House Site dilna 9 te chu remtihpuiin, recommend-tlakah a ngai a; Periodic Patta dilna pathum zinga 2 pawh pawmpuiin, pakhat dang erawh chu Serchhip Town planning Area chhunga awm a nih avangin recommend a ni ve ta lo a ni.

Vawiina dilna lut, Committee-in a ngaihtuah takte hi Serchhip VC area 6 – New Serchhip North, New Serchhip South, Chanmari, P&E, Vengchung leh Dinthar area amite an ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit District Police te'n District Level Conference hmang
content:
344/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 30th of April, 2026 :Vawiin khan SP Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Mamit District Police te chuan District Level Conference an hmang a. Mamit District chhunga SDPO te leh Police Station hrang hranga Officer-In-Charge te leh Investigating Officer te kalkhawmin, district chhunga dan leh thupek kenkawhna kawnga hmasawn dan turte, Mamit District chhunga rukruk leh sualna thleng hrang hrangte tih rem dan turte sawi ho a ni.

Pu Manny Bushan Singh, SP Mamit chuan kumin chhunga Mamit District crime data tarlangin, case 51 ziah luh tawh zingah rukruk case a tam ber thu a sawi a. Heng zinga case 29 te chu chargesheet tawh niin case dang chu chhui mek leh chargesheet theih mai turte an ni tih a sawi a.

SP chuan Mamit District chhunga rukruk hluar mekah zan leh chhun reh lai te, Pathianni ah te police te patrolling uar turin a chah a, police in portal hrang hrang kan neihte hmang tangkai turin a chah bawk. Rukrutu chauh hrem lova, an thil ruk ngei a ni tih hrechunga leitute hrem tel ngei an tul thu a sawi bawk. Dan thar hriat a tul thu tarlang telin, dan thar chungchang te, rukruk leh sualna dang hluar mek laka mipuite himna turte mipui, thalai leh school naupangte'n an hriat theihnan  awareness campaign uar turin a chah. Police chu mipui rawngbawltu an nih anga harsatna nei an hnen rawn pantute chu hawihhawm taka lo dawngsawnga, an harsatna su kiang tura theihtawp chhuahpui thin turin a chah a. Sub-division hrang hranga police te inpumkhat leh inlungrual taka thawk ho turin a chah bawk a ni.

He hun kaihruaitu Pi C.Lalbiaksiami,Additional SP Mamit chuan police hna chu eizawnna mai nilo, mipui rawngbawlna pawimawh tak a ni tih hria a theihna zawng zawng hlan chunga thawh tur a nih thu a sawi a. Tunlai thiamna mil zela police-te in her rem zel a tul thu a sawi bawk.

Attachment

title: AIZAWL MUNICIPAL CORPORATION INTHLANPUI 2026 THLIRLETNA NEIH A NI
content:
343/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 30th April 2026 :Vawiin khan State Election Commissioner Dr. H. Lalthlangliana kaihhruaina hnuaiah Aizawl Municipal Corporation inthlanpui 2026 thlirletna hun chu a Office Chamber-ah neih a ni, SEC hian inthlanpui boruak muanawm tak hnuaia neih zawh a nih avang leh tluang taka result chhiarna hun neih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, chumi atana MPF leh Political Party ten tha taka an thawhpui avanga lawmthu sawiin sawrkar hnathawk inthlan kaihhnawiha mawhphurhna nei zawng zawng ten an chanpual tha taka an hlen chu lawmthu a sawi bawk a, election officials duty tura ruatte zingah an duty laia tawhsual tawk an awm lo leh rilru leh taksa emaw chhungkaw lam emaw harsatna avanga thlak ngai an awm lo chu Pathian kaihhruaina a ni tih sawiin, Model Code of Conduct chu he thlirletna hunah hian a tawp nghal thu a sawi a, AMC term intanna hi District magistrate hmaa oath-taking an lak ni atanga chhiar tur a nih thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Commissioner hian tum danga la tih ngailoh tun inthlanpuia an hmalakna hrang hrangte a tarlang a, chung zingah chuan home voting hlawhtling taka an kalpui thei te, SEC Office-a Persons with Election Duty (PED) ten vote thlak a ni ta te leh EVM-a vote chhiar theih loh harsatna thleng tha taka chinfel a ni thei te chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a.

Tun tum AMC inthlanpui ah hian Ward – XIX/6 Hlimen – 1 ah vote tla tha ber in, vote nei zawng zawng atanga za zelah 77.72 in an thlak a, vote tlak chhiatna ber chu Ward – II/3 Bawngkawn – VIII Polling Station-ah niin, vote hi za zelah 39.30 a tla a ni. Vote tamna ber ward hi ward no. – XVIII niin, voters 18906 an awm a, voters tlemna ber ward no. VIII ah vote 7975 a awm a ni. Candidate zawng zawnga vote hmu tam ber chu ZPM Candidate Pu K. Lalrodinga( Ward – XVIII) a ni a, vote 5899 a hmu a, a chak ber leh a dawttu inthlauhna tam ber chu Ward-IV ah niin ZPM candidate Pi Vanlalhriatrengi’n amah hnaih bertu MNF candidate Pi R. Lalnunthari chu vote 2121 in a hneh a ni. Candidate te kum chawhrual hi kum 50 niin thlantlinte kum chawhrual hi kum 49 a ni a. Candidate tling zinga upa ber Pu V.L. Zamlova( Ward – XV ) hi kum 69 mi niin, candidate tling zinga naupang ber chu Pi Christina Roluahpuii Sailo( Ward – VIII) niin, kum 31 mi a ni.

Inthlan vuakvetah khan MCC bawhchhiatna vawi 2 awmin chinfel a ni a, MCC bawhchhia a puh report 6 lutte chu evidence nen uluk taka zirchian a nih hnuah thutling lova ngaih vek a ni. Veng tamna ber ward hi Ward-XVIII niin veng pariat a awm a, veng tlemna ber ward hi ward paruk niin chungte chu – Ward No. V, VI, VIII, XII, XIII leh XVI te an ni a, veng pathum theuh an awm a ni. Candidate thlan tlinte zingah Post-Graduate – 7, Graduate – 10 leh Under graduate (ClassXII) – 2 an awm a, Under Matric (HSLC) an awm lo a ni.

Thlirletna hunah hian MPF lam aiawh te, Political Party hrang hrang aiawh ten inthlan tha taka zawh fel a ni ta chu lawmawm an tih thu sawiin, hmasawn ngaihna lai hrang hrangte sawihona hun hman a ni bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Self Defense Training in Taekwondo for EMRS School Girls kick off neih a ni
content:
342/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 30th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Conference Hall, Planning & Programme Implementation Department-ah Self Defense Training in Taekwondo for EMRS (Eklavaya Model Residential School) School Girls hawn a ni a. Kick off programme hi Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department, Planning & Programme Implementation Department hnuaia EMRS Society leh MATA (Mizoram Amateur Taekwondo Association)-te tangho in an buatsaih a ni.

He hunah hian Pi Zoramthangi Chhangte, Director, Womenn & Child Development Dept. chuan kalkhawmte hnenah Beti Bachao Beti Padhao (BBBP) chungchang  sawiin, BBBP hnuaiah hian hmeichhe naupang hmasawnna turin Self Defense ( mahni invenna)  pek hi a ngaipawimawh hle a, taksa hriselna mai bakah rilru hriselna leh mahni inrintawkna a pe tel bawk tih a sawi. Hmeichhe naupang ten mahni inringtawk taka an inven theih chuan khawtlang a him mai ni lovin intluktlanna (equality) kawngah hmasawnna a nih theih thu a sawi.

BBBP hian thiltum paruk neiin, Sex Ratio at Birth tihsan te, Institutional Delivery tihsan te, kum tin 1% a 1st trimester ANC(Antenatal Care) registration tihsan te, Kum tin 1% a secondary enrolment tihsan te, Secondary leh Higher Secondary-a hmeichhe naupang school bang (drop out) rate endik te, Hmeichhe thi neih chungchanga inenkawl dan  (Menstrual Hygiene management) awareness te a ni. Heng a thiltumah te hian Mizoram chu hmasawnna tur la awm bawk mah se, dinhmun tha tak ah a awm thu a sawi bawk.

Dr. Lalrinchhana , Principal Adviser-cum-Additional Secretary, Planning & Programme Implementation Dept. chuan thu sawi bawkin, Programme for Self Defense Training in Taekwondo for EMRS School Girls chu hmalakna tha tak a nih thu a sawia, MATA-te nena thawhhona tha tak neih a, hmeichhia te dinhmun tha zawk a chawikanna a nih mai bakah, Taekwondo sport tan pawh hmasawnna kawng tha tak a nih theih tur thu a sawi a ni.

Self Defense Training in Taekwondo for EMRS School Girls hi National Society for Tribal Students (NESTS), Ministry of Tribal Affairs in a ngen angin, BBBP Scheme, Women & Child Development  Dept. atanga fund hmuh a ni a, MATA ten trainer tur buatsaihin, EMRS hmun hrang hrang 11- Lunglei,Serchhip,Lawngtlai,Ngopa,Tuipang,Chawngte,Tlangnuam,Tlungvel,Zawlnuam,Bilkhawthlir leh Noaohthlaha hmeichhia pawl VI-XII atanga zirlai naupang 1819-te tan training hi buatsaih a ni.

Pi Lalzarmawii, Commisioner & Secretary, Social Welfare,Women & Child Development Dept. kaihhhruaina in hun hi hman a ni a, MATA officials te mai bakah sawrkar lama hotu thenkhatte an tel a ni. Pu Lalhmingmawia Sailo, Programme Manager(A), Mizoram EMRS Society chuan lawmthu sawinain he hun hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Helna leh innghirnghona ti chhuak thei thil reng reng lakah kan zain inthiarfihlim ang u - Chief Minister
content:
341/2026-2027

Sesawng, the 30th April 2026:Hmar Peoples' Convention Democratic, Lalhmingthanga Sanate Faction te chu an ralthuamte tunga nunphung pangai zawh turin an rawn kir a. Vawiin khan hemi puala program pawimawh tak Sawrkarin a buatsaih chu Central Training Institute Parade Ground, Sesawngah Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan a hmanpui.  He hunah hian Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama, Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga leh Minister, MP (LS), Deputy Speaker, Adviser to CM leh MLA eng emaw zatin an tel bawk a ni.

Tun thla April ni 14 khan Mizoram sorkar leh HPCD Lalhmingthanga Sanate Faction te hian Sakawrdaiah inremna an ziak tawh a. Inremna an ziah thu sorkar thuchhuah pawh I&PR chuan a lo ti chhuak tawh a ni. Inremna angin vawiin hian an ralthuamte tunga an rawn kirna hun buatsaih a ni ta a ni.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, Mizoram ralmuan thu kan sawi apianga kan rilru sira lo lang thin chu HPC (D) te an ni a. Anni nena inremna neih duhin inhawng takin kan indawr a. Kan Home Minister leh a thawhpuite an thawkrim hle a, an chungah lawmthu ka sawi a. Vawiin hi kan lo thleng ta a ni. Tunah chuan thinlung dam takin Mizoram chu state ralmuang tak a nih thu chhuang takin kan sawi thei tawh ang.

Mizo hnam zingah hian tumah Mizo hnam bik kan awm lova. Kan zavai hian Mizo kan ni. Vawiinah hian Mizo hnam chhunga hnam pengte hi mahni puala dinchhuah tuma beitu awm ta se, tumah an dinchhuah a rinawm loh. Chuvang chuan Mizo nihnaah hian kan lungawitlan a, kan inpumkhat hian kan dingchhuak zawk dawn a ni, a ti a. Inpumkhatna kawng zawh turin mi tinte a sawm.

Remna hlutzia hi sawifiah thiam a har hle a. Mizorama remna leh muanna a awm theih nana ka kalsan takte leh ka thil chante ka ngaihtuah a. Nunna hlutziate, ralmuan nawmziate ka ngaihtuah a. Remna man hi a to a ni. Vawiina ralthuam dahtute kan ngaihlu che u a, mi huaisente chauh hi an tlawm ngam thin a. Chung mi huaisen chu in ni. Mizo mipuite chuan helna hi kan ramah a lo chhuah leh kan remti tawh lo a. Chutiang ur chhuak thei thil reng reng hi chu tuman i ching tawh lo ila, helna leh innghirnghona ti chhuak thei thil reng reng lakah kan zain inthiarfihlim ang u. Vawi khat tlin ve duh vang maia innghirnghona ti chhuak thei policy leh ngaihdan neih hi bansan ila, kan ramah remna leh muanna tluantling nei zui zel turin i tangrual ang u, tiin mipuite a sawm a ni.

Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga pawhin thusawiin, vawiin hi Mizoram tana ni chhinchhiahtlak a ni a. Inrema nei tura rawn chhuak HPC (D) (LF) Cadre te kan lo lawm che u a ni. He inremna lo thlen theih chhan bulpui chu inremna duh kan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma a ni a. Mizoramah remna a awm theih nana Central Service hna zahawm tawk tak bansantu kha a ni a. Vawiin thlengin remna a ngaihlu zui zel a, kan ram tan Remna Chhinchhiahna (Symbol of Peace) a tling a ni. Ram tana in rammut chhante ti hlawhtling turin state sorkar nen kan thawkho tawh dawn a, in nupui fanaute nen lungmuang takin awm ula, kan zain lungrual takin kan thawkho dawn nia, a ti.

Pu Lalbiakzama, Speaker pawhin thusawiin, Hmar Demand Area chhunga Ruling Party MLA awm chhun ka nih angin remna neih hi ka thupui ber pakhat a ni a. Hetia inremna a lo awm ta hi ka lawm em em a ni, a ti.

Pu Lalhmingthanga Sanate pawhin thusawiin, kalphung thar mipui sorkarah hian kan lengin kan hria a. Kan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma pawhin kan harsatnate min hrethiam niin kan ngai a. Unity Bridge min dawhsak nghal a, Mauchar kawng min siamsak a, kan bial hmasawnna tura a hmalakna dangte kan hmu a. Sorkar nen kan han indawr ta a ni.

Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, Adviser to CM (Political) a thawkrim hle a, Pu Lalbiakzama, Speaker-in thahnem a ngai hle bawk a. Kan duh ang diak diak inremna chu hmu lo mahila lungawipui theih inremna nia kan ngaih avangin kan lo inrem ta a ni, a ti.

Home Coming & Arms Laying Ceremony hi Pastor Lalhmunsiama, ICI, Sesawng bialtu chuan hunserh a hmang a, Pu Vanlalmawia, Secretary, Home chuan inlawmna thu sawiin he program pawimawh tak hi tan a ni. HPC (D) (LF) Cadre ten an silai leh ralthuamte IGP Htrs Pu H. Ramthlengliana kutah an hlan a, Pu Stephen Lalrinawma, Sr. SP (CID) kaihhruaiin ralthuam lek tawh lo tura intiamna (Oath Taking) an nei zui a ni.

Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, MLA, Adviser to CM chuan lawmthu sawiin inkhawm a khar a ni.

Kum 1986 a Peace Accord ziah a nih khan Hmar hnamten an beisei a phak lova ngaiin HPC an din ta a. Kum 1994 ah Mizoram sorkar nen an ziak a, Sinlung Hills Development Council a ding ta a. He inremnaa dam thei lo mi thenkhatin HPC(D) a din leh a, chuta an hruaitu hmasa ber chu Lalhmingthanga Sanate hi a ni. HPC(D) Pu H. Lalsangbera Faction lam chu sorkarin kum 2018 April thlaah inremna a neihpui a. Vawiina inremna a neihpui leh tak Pu Lalhmingthanga Sanate Faction hi kum 2024 atang khan inbiakna neihpui lehin, tum li inbiakna neih a nih hnuah inremna ziak a lo ni ta a. He ti hian Mizoramah hnam bil hel pawl an awm tawh lo nia hriat a ni.

title: CHHIATRUPNA THLEN THULHA CHAKZAWKA HMA LAK A NIH THEIH DAN TUR NGAIHTUAHIN SERCHHIP DDMA THUKHAWM
content:
340/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 30thApril 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Disaster Management Authority chu an Chairman Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma hovin chhiatrupna thleng palh thei laka inven dan leh chak zawka hmalak dan tur ngaihtuahin DC Meeting Hall-ah an thukhawm.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian SDC Pu Vanthangpuia’n Serchhip DDMA ten chhiatrupna hmachhawn dan tura ruahmanna ‘Disaster Management Plan’ an siamte sawi zauna a neih hnuin, sawrkar department hrang hrang – Police, PWD, PHE, P&E ten chhiatrupna thleng thei laka ruahmanna an neihte leh an dinhmun hrang hrangte an sawi a; mipuite leh khawtlang hruaitute nena thawhhona tha zawk a awm theih dan tur te, tun aia rang zawka chanchin inhrilhtawn zung zung theihna a awm theih dan tur te, bungrua (material) indaih lohna awm thei laka inralrinna leh mumal zawka hmanrua (resources) te vawn that leh enkawl dan turte, Logistic Team ten chakzawka hna an thawh theih dan turte sawi ho a ni.

Chhiatrupna a lo thlen changa mipuite’n sawrkar department an biakpawh theihna turte vawiin meeting-ah hian chhawp chhuah thar leh a ni a, chungte chu:

1. Police: 112 (he emergency nambar – 112  hi Serchhip district chhungah englai pawhin a hman theih reng a, hei bakah hian chhiatna a lo thlenin mahni awmna area-a Police Station te pan theih reng an ni).

2. PWD: 8553098901 (Serchhip Division)

3. PHE: 9612081657 (Control Room)

4. P&E: 9402542662 (Serchhip leh a chhehvel khuate tan) leh 9402542661 (Thenzawl leh a chhehvel khuate tan)

5. NHIDCL: 7403908888 (Aizawl leh Keitum inkara chhiatna thlengah)

DDMA Chairman Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan chhiatrupna thleng thei lakah department hrang hrangte’n inbuatsaihna tha tak an neih avangin lawmthu a sawi a; khawtlang hruaitu VC, YMA leh mipuite’n tha taka sawrkar an tawiawm thin naah lawmthu sawiin, thawh hona tha tak neihpui leh zel turin a sawm nghal bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Govt JB College Lungleiah District Fisheries Office huaihawtin lui dung humhalh pawimawhzia inzirtirna buatsaih a ni
content:
339/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 30:Vawiin khan Mizoram District Transformation Programme, District Catalytic Fund (Handholding) hnuaiah Lunglei District Fisheries Development Office huaihawtin Government J. Buana College Multipurpose Hall-ah lui dung humhalh pawimawhzia inzirtirna, "Riverine Conservation Awareness Campaign" buatsaih a ni a. Lunglei RD Block huam chhunga Young Mizo Association (YMA) branch hrang hrang hruaitute, Village Council leh Local Council member-te, District Riverine Conservation Board member-te, Govt J. Buana College zirtirtu leh zirlaite leh Seventhday Adventist School zirlaite an tel.

He hun hi Fisheries Secretary Er Lalrothanga chuan Khuallian niin a hmanpui a. Mizoramah lui tui a tlem sawtin, luia cheng nungchate pawh an chereu sawt hle tih sawiin, kan luite enkawl ṭhat a ṭul tak zet tih a sawi a. Mizorama chengte'n kan luite ṭha taka kan enkawl loh chuan nakin lawkah chuan tui thianghlim in tlak leh tui hman tur hnianghnar neih zawh loh kan hmabak mai a hlauhawm thu a sawi a. Lui sangha leh nungchate humhalh rah sengtu chu a humhalhtute tho kan ni tiin, lui dung humhalh kawngah Fisheries Department-in dan leh inkaihhruaina a neih (Act & Rules) mila Department thawhpui thiam zel turin khawtlang hruaitute leh YMA branch tinte a sawm.

Khual zahawm, Lunglei Election Officer Pi Lalhruaitluangi pawhin thu sawiin, District Transformation Programme hnuaia District Catalytic Fund (Handholding) hmanga DFDO Office-in hun hlawhtling tak an buatsaih thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Lui dung humhalh ṭhat chu khaw mite ei leh in atan mai bakah, khualzin hipna leh sum lak luhna hnar ṭha tak a ni tel thei tih sawiin, khaw hrang hrang chu lui dung humhalh ṭhata inel zel turin a chah.

Lunglei District Fisheries Development Officer (DFDO) Pi Christina Lalramchhani'n hun kaihruaiin, inlawmna thu a sawi a. Lunglei District huam chhunga lui dung humhalh ṭha YMA group leh branch chawimawina hun hman niin, lui dung humhalh ṭhaa thlan YMA Vanva Group, YMA Hlumte Branch leh YMA Hauruang Branch te hnenah pawisa fai ₹5,000/- leh thuziak hlan ṭheuh a ni a. YMA Sub-Headquarters Lunglei Secretary Pu C. Lalrindika leh Fisheries Inspector Pu Lalsiamliana te'n thu an sawi bawk.

Chawhnu lamah Lunglei DFDO Pi Christina Lalramchhani leh Fisheries Extension Officer Pu Lalruatfela Chhangte te'n Mizoram Fisheries Amendment Act, 2022 leh Mizoram Fisheries Rules, 2019 chungchang zirtirin, lui dung leh luia nungchate enkawl leh humhalh dan te, sangha man theih dan leh man theih hun te, danin a phal leh phal loh leh hremna hrang hrang awm thei te an sawi fiah a. Zawhna leh chhanna hun hman niin, Fisheries Department leh khawtlang thawh hona kawnga thil pawimawh hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni bawk a. Assistant Fisheries Officer Pu T. Vanlalchhuanawma'n lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: DIRECTORATE OF HIGHER & TECHNICAL EDUCATION THUCHHUAH
content:
338/2026-2027

Aizawl the 30th April, 2026:Nagaland University, School of Engineering & Technology, Lumami, Kohima Campus (Meriema), Nagaland leh Thapar Institute of Engineering & Technology, Patiala, Punjab hnuaia Engineering course hrang hrang zir duh te tan Technical Wing Office, Lily Veng Chaltlang ah Dt.10.07.2026 (Friday) thleng dilna thehluh theih a ni e.

Hrechiang duh te tan Technical Wing Office, Higher & Technical Education, Chaltlang Lily Vengah office hun chhungin zawhfiah theih a ni angemawDepartment websitehttps://dhte.mizoram.qov.inah en theih reng ani bawk e.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP - IN YLA SANGAU SUB- HEADQUARTERS CONFERENCE VAWI 2- NA HMANPUI
content:
337/2026-2027

Lawngtlai,30th April 2026 :Vawiin khan YLA Sangau Sub- Headquarters Conference vawi 2- na chu Sangau -III Community Hall- ah neih a ni a, Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan  khuallian ni a hmanpuiin, Pu F. Lalrothanga, President, CYLA chu khualzahawm a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan YLA Sub-Headquarters Conference - a Khuallian tura sawm a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Conference chhimtu zawng zawngte chibai bukna a nei a. CYLA Conference, Cheurala neihah ' Ram leh hnam humhalh' puan a nih angin, a humhalh leh venhim kawngah tha thlah lo a thawh a tul tiin, theihtawp chhuah turin YLA Member- leh Laifate  a fuih a. Ram leh hnam dinchhuah leh hmasawnna turin mimal leh  Tlawmngai Pawl hrang hrangte an pawimawh hle tih tarlangin, ram leh hnam tana thahnem ngai taka thawk zel turin a chah a. Thalaite khawvel a nih tawh angin, thalaiten mawhphurhna an nei lian hle tiin,  a bik takin Laifate zingah ram leh hnam hmangaihtu tak tak  an lo  chhuah zel a beisei thu a sawi a. Ei leh bar kawnga intodelh tur te,  ram leh hnam siamthat kawngah leh hmasawnna turah Laifate harhthar a hun tawh tak zet tih tarlangin, YLA pawhin hemi kawngah hian chak zawka hmalak a tul hle a ni,a ti.  Mahni hnam ziarâng leh nihna humhalh lote an boral zel thin tih tarlangin, hnam ziarâng leh tihphung, tawng, leh  inthuamnate humhalh turin Laifaten mawhphurhna lian tak an nei tih sawiin, ram leh hnam ziarâng, hnam nihna leh tihphungte vawnghim zel tura  tan la thar theuh  turin a chah a ni.

Khuallian chuan  Lawngtlai District - Faina leh thianghlimna kawngah theihtawp chhuah mek niin ' Bawrhsap Award' kalpui  a ni a, heihian fiana kawngah District tan hmasawnna tha zawk a thlen mek a ni, a ti. Lawngtlaiin hmasawnna rahbi thar kai turin District Administration leh LADC- ten theihtawp an chhuah mek tih tarlangin 'Tho law dir tuah' kalpui tan mek a nih thu a sawi a.Ruihhlo do kawngah ' Drugs Free District Campaign ' kalpui tan niin, nimin lamah Sangau RD Block - ah kalpui tan a ni, a ti. Ram leh hnam eichhetu, nunna tam tak min laksaktu Ruihhlo do kawngah sawrkarin theihtawp chhuah mekin hemi kawngah hian VC,NGO, Kohhran leh mipuite tawiawmna tha a tul hle tih sawiin, thawhpuiah a sawm a. Lawngtlai District- in hmasawnna tluantling neia, district dangte entawn tlak ni tur leh ram leh hnam humhalh kawnga theihtawp chhuah zel turin Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan YLA Member leh mipuite a sawm nghal bawk.

Pu F. Lalrothanga chuan Sangau chu YLA dinchhuahna hmun anih angin, YLA tan chuan a hluin, hriatreng tlak a ni, a ti a. Lawngtlai District- hmasawnna turah YLA Sangau Sub - Headquarters ten nasa takin tha an thaw tawh tih tarlangin, hmalam hunah pawh theihtawpa tha thlah lo a thawk turin a chah a. Ram leh hnam humhalh,  dinchhuahna leh parchhuahna kawngah YLA - Member ten  tihtur pawimawh tak an nei tih sawiin, a bik takin YLA thiltum tihhlawhtlin kawngah theihtawpa thawh a ngai a ni, a ti. Ram ri humhalh leh venhim kawngah leh Ruihhlo do kawngah  YLA chuan theihtawp a chhuah mek zel tih tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian YLA chuan tha a thlah ngai dawn lo a ni, a ti. Lairam leh hnam tana mi tangkai zawk ni tur leh hmasawnna thelntu ni theuh turin kalkhawmte leh YLA- Member zawng zawngte a sawm  a ni.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian  HSLC - a tithate hnenah lawmpuina thilpek hlan niin, Pu Jammy Vanhmingliana SDC chuan Power Point Presentation hmangin ' Drug Free District Campaign' kalpui dan leh hmalakna tur kawng hrang hrangte sawizauna a nei a. Pu LC. Chhanchunglian, President, YLA Sangau Sub- Headquarters chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu sawiin, Pu. L.Z. Ringlawt, Secretary, YLA Sangau Sub- Headquarters chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

title: Mamit District chhunga tui thianghlim neihna kawnga hmalaknate Chief Engineer-in tlawh
content:
336/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 30th of April, 2026 :Nimin ni 29th April 2026 khan Er. Lalropuia, Chief Engineer, Zone-I , PHED chuan Zomuantlang tlawhin JJM hnuaia hna thawhte endikna (Inspection) a nei a. Khawtlang hruaitute nen inkawmin, tuithianghlim hnianghnar taka an neih zel theih nana hmalak zel dan tur te sawi ho a ni a,WATSAN committee te'n tha taka an tuilakna an enkawlnaah lawmthu a sawi bawk a ni.

Vawiin chawhmaah Augmentation of Greater Mamit Water Supply Scheme (Part-I), NESIDS hnuaia thawh chu a en nghal a. Hmachhawp tlemte la awm thawh dan tur te sawi ho a ni. Electric motor hmanga tui pump-na, March thla a test theih tawh a peih reng tawh chu, Power and Electricity department te nena inrawn tawn a, testing and commissioning a hma lama tih dan tur te rel a ni bawk.

Hei bakah Tut pump-na tur Raw water pumping system, Augmentation of Greater Mamit WSS (Part-II) chu en ho nghal a ni a. Hei hi kum 2022 a lo thawh zawh tawh, 2024 a Remal Cyclone in a tihchhiat tak avanga function tawh lo a ni a. A siamthatna tur Sawrkara dil mek pawh chak taka bawhzui a nih thu te a sawi a,Augmentation of Greater Mamit WSS chu a nihna tur ang takin a function thuai theih a beisei thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova’n YMA Sub-Headquarters Saitual Inkhawmpui vawi 3-na a hmanpui
content:
335/2026-2027

Saitual, the 30th April, 2026 :Ni 3 awh YMA Sub-Headquarters Saitual Inkhawmpui vawi 3-na chu “Ruihhlo do” tih thupui hmangin Lal Hrangchhuana Run, NE Khawdungseiah neih a ni a, nizan khan Pu B. Lalchhanzova, Minister of State chu khuallian niin hun a hmanpui.

He hunah hian Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan thu a sawi a, YMA Sub-Headquarters Saitual Inkhawmpui vawi 3-na an hmang thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, NE Khawdungsei panna kawng pawh tha a tih thu a sawi a, ram hmasawnna hmel hmua a inhriat thu a sawi bawk.

Khuallian chuan YMA chu Mizo hnam phuar khawmtu leh hnam lungphum pawimawh tak a ni, a ti a, he inkhawmpuiah hian Saitual District-a YMA member te inpumkhatna leh tanrualna a lang chiang hle tih a sawi. YMA chu ramngaw, nungcha leh lui humhalh kawngah pawh hma lain, khawtlang nuna thil tha lo, ruihhlo leh eirukna do kawngah pawh theih tawp an chhuah thin tih a sawi a, YMA chu chhawm nung zel turin kalkhawmte chu a fuih nghal bawk a ni.

Minister chuan hnam anga kan ropuina kan chhawm nun zel theih nan pun chak kan mamawh tih sawiin, nupui pasal innei hma tura infuih thar a tul a ni, a ti a. Thalaite chu an taksate ruihhlo bawiha pe lo tur leh mahni inkhawngaihna dah thaa hma lam pen zel turin a fuih bawk a ni. Khuallian chuan YMA Sub-Headquarters Saitual Inkhawmpui hmang tura kalkhawm zawng zawng te chu duhsakna hlanin, SYMA hnenah inkhawmpui tanpuina a hlan nghal bawk a ni.

Zanin YMA Sub-Headquarters inkhawmpui hi Pu R. Lalruatkima, President, SYMA chuan a kai hruai a, Pu Zosangzela, Treasurer, Tamdil Group chuan hunserh a hmang. Khuallian Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan thu sawiin, Pu Lalnunsanga Khawlhring, CF (EC & NC) chuan ramngaw humhalh pawimawhzia a sawi bawk a ni. Ruihhlo donaa ti tha leh ramngaw leh nungcha humhalh kawnga ti tha YMA Branch te hnenah lawmman pek nghal a ni bawk.

NE Khawdungseia YMA Sub-Headquarters Saitual Inkhawmpui hi April ni 28 atanga April ni 30 thleng neih tur a ni a, he inkhawmpuiah hian vantlang inkhawm, rorel inkhawm, hruaitu inthlan leh cultural programme te neih a ni dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: Lunglei DDMA Chairman-in Lunglei District chhunga zirna inte tan ni 30.04.2026 (Ningani) sikul chawlh a puang
content:
334/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 30 :Indian Meteorological Department-in khawchin thlir lawknaa a tar lan angin, Lunglei District-ah ruah sur leh thli tleh a nasat theih avangin leh chumi avanga chhiatna thleng palh thei laka zirlai naupangte an him zawk nan Lunglei District Disaster Management Authority Chairman, District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan Disaster Management Act, 2005 Section 30(v) & Section 34 tlawh chhanin Lunglei District huam chhunga zirna in (sikul) zawng zawngte chu vawiin April ni 30, 2026 (Ningani) hian khar vek turin thupek a chhuah.

Attachment
